html:
“Can package up to 4 stacks of items into one item that can be unpacked later.”

-

The Bundling Wrap is a craftable Item that can only be prototyped by learning its Blueprint. It is found in the Storage Solutions Filter, requires 1 Wax Paper and 1 Rope to craft, and is used to access 4 storage slots that can be wrapped up to create Bundled Supplies holding any items placed within.

Prototyping the Bundling Wrap requires a Rare Blueprint that is dropped by the Bee Queen and rarely, Klaus instead. Several items cannot be put inside Bundled Supplies, such as itself and Chester's Eye Bone, Star-Sky, the Stag Antler, and the Ancient Key.

Wax Paper is renewable through the Loot Stash after killing Klaus. Honeycombs are also renewable through the death of the Bee Queen, and the use of the Deconstruction Staff on the Bee Queen Crown she drops.

Bundled Supplies

“Can be unwrapped to release items inside.”

-

Bundled Supplies are created by wrapping up to 4 stacks of items with a Bundling Wrap. It can be stored in Chests, Backpacks or the player's Inventory. Its appearance changes based on the number of storage slots used when wrapping items, regardless of the size of the stack in any slot or the type of item placed inside. Food items can be stored inside Bundled Supplies indefinitely without spoiling, providing a great deal of utility for survival. Unwrapping it will cause all the items stored inside to drop on ground, in addition to 1 Wax Paper.

A Razor can be used to peek inside.

×1-4

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Proof of Purchase Iron Containment Unit skin is obtained by purchasing the WX-78 Bandai Firelink Don't Starve.
Woven - Elegant
Cawnival Collection
Cawnival Wrapping
Keep the memories of the Cawnival fresh in your mind, even after it wraps up.
Woven - Elegant
Gothic Collection
Gloomy Wrapping
Somehow, even the bow can't make it cheery.
Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Parchment Paper
This floral parchment wrap keeps goods as fresh as a daisy.
Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Cloth Wrap
Packed with love and care.
Woven - Elegant
Mystic Collection
Mystic Weave Wrap
Wrap your goods in mystery.
Proof of Purchase
Iron Containment Unit
Imprison your goods in this superior metal casing.

Tips

  • Since unwrapping a Bundled Supplies returns the Wax Paper used to craft Bundling Wrap, the only net loss per use is 1 Rope.
  • Each held Bundling Wrap can be used to gain three extra inventory slots, useful when collecting a lot of resources and transporting said resources from one place to another.
  • A common use for Bundling Wraps is for storing Light Bulbs, as they no longer spoil quickly while bundled.

Trivia

  • Bundling Wraps and Bundled Supplies were first introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Herd Mentality update during A New Reign. They were later added to Don't Starve in the Quality of Life update.
  • According to Wickerbottom, Bundling Wrap has antibacterial effects. This may explain why bundled Food does not perish: Wax Paper neutralizes the microbes that cause spoilage.

Assets

Gallery

  • Bundled Supplies of different sizes.
  • The interface that appears when using Bundling Wrap

"bundlewrap"
“Wrapping things up should make them easier to carry.”
–Wilson
“We could hide some gross things, I guess.”
–Willow
“Is for hiding goodies.”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail always helped me tie the bow.”
–Wendy
“FOR WRAPPING THINGS IN BUNDLES”
–WX-78
“Antibacterial wrapping for food preservation.”
–Wickerbottom
“The paper's brown. Like wood.”
–Woodie
“I guess we could wrap a few things up.”
–Maxwell
“The consolidation of rope and paper makes for good wrapping.”
–Wagstaff
“That's a wrap.”
–Wigfrid
“Let's cocoon something for later!”
–Webber
“That's a wrap!”
–Walani
“A good food wrap.”
–Warly
“Ol' Woodlegs can bury 'is tre'sure in't.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS FOR THE WRAPPING O' WILBA STUFFS”
–Wilba
“Put stuff inside”
–Wormwood
“Wrapped up extra tight so it'll fit in my pocket.”
–Wheeler
“We could wrap stuff up for later.”
–Winona
“Bind all cursed objects!”
–Wortox
“Pack lots of things, flurpt!”
–Wurt
“Efficient packing is truly an overlooked art in camping.”
–Walter
“It'll keep my things safe from the ravages of time.”
–Wanda
“Can package up to 4 stacks of items into one item that can be unpacked later.”

–Woodie
“Nice and snug.”
–Maxwell

–Wagstaff
“Ready tö take ön an epic saga.”

“Huh. Somehow it's less heavy like this.”

“Keep for later.”
–Wurt
“It's packed full of provisions.”
–Walter
“Bundled up for quick and efficient carrying.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Gói Gói là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được và chỉ có thể tạo nguyên mẫu bằng cách tìm hiểu Bản thiết kế của nó. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Giải pháp Lưu trữ, yêu cầu 1 Giấy sáp và 1 Dây thừng để chế tạo và được sử dụng để truy cập vào 4 khe lưu trữ có thể được gói lại để tạo ra Vật tư đi kèm chứa bất kỳ vật phẩm nào được đặt bên trong.

=={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips== * Since unwrapping a Bundled Supplies returns the Wax Paper used to craft Bundling Wrap, the only net loss per use is 1 Rope. * Each held Bundling Wrap can be used to gain three extra inventory slots, useful when collecting a lot of resources and transporting said resources from one place to another. * A common use for Bundling Wraps is for storing [[Light Bulb]]s, as they no longer spoil quickly while bundled. =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Bundling Wraps and Bundled Supplies were first introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the ''[[A New Reign#November 24th, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update during ''[[A New Reign]]''. They were later added to ''[[Don't Starve]]'' in the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History|Quality of Life]]'' update. * According to [[Wickerbottom]], Bundling Wrap has antibacterial effects. This may explain why bundled Food does not perish: Wax Paper neutralizes the microbes that cause spoilage. == [[File:Research Notes.png|32px]] Assets == |-| Cloth Wrap= Cloth Wrap Dropped.png|Dropped Cloth Wrap Dropped2.png|Dropped 2 Cloth Wrap Dropped3.png|Dropped 3 Cloth Wrap Dropped4.png|Dropped 4 |-| Mystic Weave Wrap= Mystic Weave Wrap Dropped.png|Dropped Mystic Weave Wrap Dropped2.png|Dropped 2 Mystic Weave Wrap Dropped3.png|Dropped 3 Mystic Weave Wrap Dropped4.png|Dropped 4 |-|Iron Containment Unit= Iron Containment Unit Dropped.png|Dropped Iron Containment Unit Dropped2.png|Dropped 2 Iron Containment Unit Dropped3.png|Dropped 3 Iron Containment Unit Dropped4.png|Dropped 4 =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== DST Update Herd Mentality.png|Bundling Wrap as seen in the poster for the ''[[A New Reign#November 24, 2016 - Herd Mentality|Herd Mentality]]'' update.
